fox-and-geese.heritage_skills_title: Build a Fox and Geese Board
fox-and-geese.fabrica_materials: Walnut or cherry hardwood, ¾ inch thick, hand-oiled with Danish oil or tung oil. Playing surface may be inlaid with a contrasting maple or ash panel for the cross-board grid area.
fox-and-geese.fabrica_dimensions: Overall board: 10×10 inches ± ¼ inch. Playing grid: 7×7 points at 1¼ inch spacing (7½ inch square grid), centered on board with 1¼ inch border. Board thickness: ¾ inch. 33 shallow drilled point-holes, ¼ inch diameter × ⅛ inch deep.

nine-men-s-morris.heritage_skills_title: Build a Nine Men's Morris Board
nine-men-s-morris.fabrica_materials: Walnut or cherry hardwood, ¾ inch thick, finished with hand-rubbed tung oil. Optional inlay: maple strips set into routed channels for the lines, creating a flush two-tone surface.
nine-men-s-morris.fabrica_dimensions: Overall board: 10×10 inches ± ¼ inch. Outer square: 8×8 inches. Middle square: 5×5 inches. Inner square: 2×2 inches. All squares centered. 24 point positions marked with shallow drilled dimples (⅛ inch diameter × 1/16 inch deep) or brass inlay dots.

the-millionaire-s-perplexity.heritage_skills_title: Build a Millionaire's Perplexity Puzzle Board
the-millionaire-s-perplexity.fabrica_materials: Dark-stained walnut or mahogany presentation board, ½ inch thick. Denomination zones inlaid or laser-engraved. Token set in turned brass or painted hardwood discs.
the-millionaire-s-perplexity.fabrica_dimensions: Board: 10×6 inches ± ¼ inch. Seven denomination zones each 1×4 inches, separated by ⅛ inch routed dividing lines. Storage drawer or fitted box: 4×3 inches.

the-buried-treasure.heritage_skills_title: Build a Buried Treasure Fraction Puzzle Set
the-buried-treasure.fabrica_materials: Hand-stained oak or cherry presentation box with sliding or hinged lid, ¼ inch thick sides. Interior compartment with 3 labeled sections. 100 brass token coins, custom-stamped.
the-buried-treasure.fabrica_dimensions: Box: 7×5×2 inches ± ¼ inch. Interior divided into 4 sections: 3 explorer compartments + 1 token compartment. Explorer cards: standard 3×5 inches. Tokens: ¾ inch diameter brass discs.

the-miller-s-puzzle.heritage_skills_title: Build The Miller's Puzzle Token Board
the-miller-s-puzzle.fabrica_materials: Cherry or maple hardwood presentation board, ½ inch thick. Nine turned hardwood token discs in a contrasting wood. Board with laser-engraved slot positions and decorative Canterbury Tales-style border.
the-miller-s-puzzle.fabrica_dimensions: Board: 12×5 inches ± ¼ inch. Nine token positions in a linear arrangement, each 1½ inch diameter circle. Center three positions slightly inset or elevated. Token discs: 1½ inch diameter × ⅜ inch thick.

the-knight-s-puzzle.heritage_skills_title: Build The Knight's Puzzle Grid Board
the-knight-s-puzzle.fabrica_title: The Knight's Puzzle Grid Board — Artisan Commission
the-knight-s-puzzle.fabrica_materials: Dark walnut or ebonized oak board, ¾ inch thick. Brass nails or brass rod pegs set into pre-drilled holes. Optional: heraldic shield shape routed from board edges.
the-knight-s-puzzle.fabrica_dimensions: Board: 12×12 inches ± ¼ inch. Peg grid: 9×9 array, 1 inch spacing, centered with 1½ inch border. Pegs: ⅛ inch diameter brass rod, ⅜ inch tall above surface. Holes drilled ⅜ inch deep.

the-mutilated-chessboard.fabrica_materials: Alternating walnut and maple inlay squares, ¾ inch thick hardwood border frame. Two corner squares either missing (routed out) or marked with recessed brass X inlays. 31 two-tone wood dominoes.
the-mutilated-chessboard.fabrica_dimensions: Board: 14×14 inches total. Playing grid: 8×8 squares at 1½ inch each (12×12 inches). Border: 1 inch walnut frame. Thickness: ¾ inch. Dominoes: 3×1½×⅜ inches each.

dominoes-block-game.fabrica_materials: 28-tile set in solid cherry or walnut hardwood, each tile 2×1×⅜ inch. Pip holes drilled with Forstner bit and filled with contrasting wood plugs (maple pips on walnut tiles, or walnut pips on maple). Bone-line divider inlaid or routed.
dominoes-block-game.fabrica_dimensions: Each tile: 2 inches × 1 inch × ⅜ inch (standard proportions). Pip holes: 3/16 inch diameter × ⅛ inch deep. Storage box: 6×4×1½ inches.

draughts-checkers.fabrica_materials: Alternating walnut and maple wood strip inlay board, ¾ inch thick, with cherry or walnut border frame. 24 turned hardwood checker discs in walnut and maple.
draughts-checkers.fabrica_dimensions: Overall board: 16×16 inches. Playing grid: 8×8 squares at 1¾ inch each (14 inch playing area). Border frame: 1 inch wide. Thickness: ¾ inch. Checker discs: 1¾ inch diameter × ¼ inch thick.

chess.fabrica_materials: Strip-and-crosscut walnut/maple inlay chessboard, ¾ inch thick, with figured walnut or rosewood border frame. Playing squares 2¼ inches. No paint — pure wood color contrast.
chess.fabrica_dimensions: Overall board: 20×20 inches. Playing grid: 8×8 squares at 2¼ inch each (18 inch playing area). Border frame: 1 inch walnut or rosewood. Thickness: ¾ inch. Optional coordinate labels inlaid in frame.

halma.fabrica_materials: Alternating walnut and maple or light/dark veneer inlay on a ¾ inch maple substrate. Corner camp boundaries inlaid with contrasting wood strips or brass rule. 4-color set of wooden cone pawns.
halma.fabrica_dimensions: Overall board: 22×22 inches. Playing grid: 16×16 squares at 1¼ inch each (20 inch playing area). Border: 1 inch walnut frame. Camp boundary: 4 triangular areas marked with inlaid contrasting border. Piece pawns: ½ inch base diameter, ¾ inch tall cones.

draughts-checkers-variants.fabrica_materials: Alternating walnut and maple inlay 10×10 board, ¾ inch thick, with walnut border frame. Optional engraved coordinate labels for tournament use. 40 turned hardwood checker discs.
draughts-checkers-variants.fabrica_dimensions: Overall board: 18×18 inches. Playing grid: 10×10 squares at 1½ inch each (15 inch playing area). Border: 1½ inch walnut frame. Thickness: ¾ inch. Checker discs: 1¼ inch diameter × ¼ inch thick.

reversi-othello.fabrica_materials: Dark green leather or felt playing surface mounted on ½ inch MDF or maple substrate, with walnut or cherry hardwood border frame. 64 two-sided discs in ebonized maple (black side) and natural maple (white side).
reversi-othello.fabrica_dimensions: Overall board: 14×14 inches. Playing grid: 8×8 squares at 1½ inch each (12 inch playing area). Border frame: 1 inch walnut. Thickness: ¾ inch. Disc diameter: 1⅜ inch. Recessed wells: ⅛ inch deep.

noughts-and-crosses-tic-tac-toe.heritage_skills_title: Build a Noughts and Crosses (Tic-Tac-Toe) Board
noughts-and-crosses-tic-tac-toe.fabrica_materials: Natural wood-slice board (cross-section of a branch, 8-10 inch diameter), live edge, hand-sanded and oiled. Grid lines wood-burned. Playing pieces: smooth river stones or turned walnut and maple discs.
noughts-and-crosses-tic-tac-toe.fabrica_dimensions: Board: 8–10 inch diameter wood slice, ¾ inch thick. Grid: two burned lines in each direction, dividing board into 9 equal zones. Pieces: 5 smooth stones per player (2-3 inch stones), or 5 turned discs per player (1½ inch diameter × ½ inch thick).

fox-and-geese-board.heritage_skills_title: Build a Fox and Geese Peg Board
fox-and-geese-board.fabrica_title: Fox and Geese (Peg Board) — Artisan Commission
fox-and-geese-board.fabrica_materials: Walnut or cherry hardwood board, ¾ inch thick, with 33 drilled holes. Turned wooden pegs in two contrasting woods. Board optionally shaped to the cross outline (outer edge routed to the cross shape).
fox-and-geese-board.fabrica_dimensions: Board: 9×9 inches (square) or cross-shaped cutout. 33 holes in cross pattern: 7×7 grid minus 4 corner 2×2 groups, at 1¼ inch spacing. Hole diameter: ¼ inch, ½ inch deep. Pegs: ¼ inch diameter dowel, ¾ inch tall above surface.

dice-chuck-a-luck.fabrica_materials: Green baize playing surface on a ¾ inch MDF or hardwood substrate, 18×12 inches. Six numbered zones silk-screened or painted in gilt on green. Brass birdcage tumbler with 3 engraved dice. Hardwood frame.
dice-chuck-a-luck.fabrica_dimensions: Layout: 18×12 inches. Six betting zones each 2½×4 inches in a row. Border: 1 inch hardwood or leather frame. Optional cage: 4-inch diameter wire birdcage tumbler on a walnut stand.

postal-chess-correspondence-chess.fabrica_materials: Compact folding chess board in walnut and maple inlay, ½ inch thick when folded. Letterpress-printed notation cards on cream laid stock. Optional: magnetic travel chess pieces.
postal-chess-correspondence-chess.fabrica_dimensions: Folding board: 8×8 inches unfolded (4×8 inches folded). 8×8 playing grid at 1-inch squares. Notation cards: 5×3 inches, 30-row format, 20 cards per set. Storage: fitted leather or book-cloth portfolio.

the-game-of-logic.heritage_skills_title: Build Lewis Carroll's Game of Logic Board
the-game-of-logic.fabrica_title: The Game of Logic — Artisan Commission
the-game-of-logic.fabrica_materials: Two inlaid hardwood diagram boards (biliteral and triliteral), each 5×5 inches, in contrasting wood with routed cell divisions. 9 turned hardwood counters in red-stained and grey-stained maple.
the-game-of-logic.fabrica_dimensions: Biliteral board: 5×5 inches, 2×2 grid with 2-inch cells. Triliteral board: 5×5 inches, 8-cell grid (2×4 zones with inner squares). Board thickness: ½ inch. Counters: ¾ inch diameter × ¼ inch thick.

agon-queens-guards.fabrica_materials: CNC-routed or laser-cut hardwood hexagonal board, 12 inches flat-to-flat, ¾ inch thick, mounted in a circular walnut frame. Six concentric rings painted in traditional spectrum colors or stained in natural wood tones. 14 turned hardwood pieces.
agon-queens-guards.fabrica_dimensions: Board: 12 inches flat-to-flat (13.9 inches corner to corner), ¾ inch thick. 91 hexagonal spaces at 1¾ inch flat-to-flat each. 6 concentric rings. Border: 1 inch walnut ring frame. Queen pieces: 1¼ inch diameter disc, ½ inch tall. Guard pieces: 1 inch diameter disc, ⅜ inch tall.

merelles-nine-mens-morris-sociable.heritage_skills_title: Build a Merelles (Three Men's Morris) Board Set
merelles-nine-mens-morris-sociable.fabrica_materials: Three-board nested set in walnut, cherry, and maple respectively — one board per Morris variant. Each board with routed or inlaid connecting lines. 36 turned wooden playing pieces in 4 contrasting woods.
merelles-nine-mens-morris-sociable.fabrica_dimensions: Board 1 (Three Men's Morris): 7×7 inches, 2-square grid. Board 2 (Six Men's Morris): 9×9 inches, 2-square grid. Board 3 (Nine Men's Morris): 11×11 inches, 3-square grid. All boards ¾ inch thick. Pieces: ¾ inch diameter discs, ¼ inch thick, 9 each in 4 woods.

knight-tour-puzzle.heritage_skills_title: Build a Knight's Tour Puzzle Board
knight-tour-puzzle.fabrica_materials: Walnut and maple alternating inlay 8×8 chessboard, ¾ inch thick, with walnut border frame. 64 turned maple tokens numbered 1-64 (laser-engraved). One hand-carved or turned walnut knight piece.
knight-tour-puzzle.fabrica_dimensions: Board: 14×14 inches overall. Playing grid: 8×8 squares at 1½ inch each (12 inch playing area). Border: 1 inch walnut frame. Board thickness: ¾ inch. Numbered tokens: ¾ inch diameter × ¼ inch thick discs. Knight piece: standard Staunton scale (~2½ inch tall).

towers-of-hanoi.fabrica_materials: American black walnut base (¾" thick, bookmatched grain preferred); turned cherry or maple pegs (⅜" diameter with decorative tenon at base); seven graduated discs in alternating cherry and maple, ¼" thick
towers-of-hanoi.fabrica_dimensions: Base: 13" × 4" × ¾". Pegs: 8" tall × ⅜" diameter. Discs: 1½" to 3" diameter in ¼" steps, ¼" thick. Overall assembled height: approx. 9".

the-reve-s-puzzle.fabrica_materials: English oak base with burned grid pattern; turned beech pegs; eight discs in two alternating hardwoods (oak and ash), ¼" thick
the-reve-s-puzzle.fabrica_dimensions: Base: 15" × 4" × ¾". Pegs: 8" tall × ⅜" diameter. Discs: 1¼" to 3" diameter in ¼" steps, ¼" thick.

the-button-puzzle.fabrica_materials: 3–4 oz vegetable-tanned saddle leather, natural tan; one antique brass 4-hole button, 1¼" diameter; edges burnished and waxed
the-button-puzzle.fabrica_dimensions: Leather strip: 9" × 1½" × 3–4 oz weight (approx. 1.5mm thick). Slits: two parallel cuts ¾" long, ⅜" apart, centered at midpoint. Button: minimum 1¼" diameter.

the-cups-and-balls.heritage_skills_title: Make a Cups and Balls Set
the-cups-and-balls.fabrica_title: Cups and Balls Set — Parlour Edition
the-cups-and-balls.fabrica_materials: Three cups turned from American black walnut; four balls hand-felted from Merino wool roving; velvet-lined mahogany presentation box
the-cups-and-balls.fabrica_dimensions: Cups: 3¼" tall × 2¾" diameter at mouth × 2" diameter at top (inverted). Wall thickness: ¼". Balls: 1" diameter felted Merino wool. Box: 12" × 4" × 4".

lotto-bingo.fabrica_materials: Twelve cards letterpress-printed on 300gsm cream card stock; ninety tokens turned from hornbeam or bone (or laser-cut from ¼" maple); velvet-lined octagonal mahogany box with brass clasp
lotto-bingo.fabrica_dimensions: Cards: 7" × 4" each, with printed grid. Tokens: ¾" diameter × ¼" thick wooden discs, numbers burned or engraved. Markers: ½" mother-of-pearl or brass discs (15 per player color × 4 colors = 60 markers). Box: 10" × 8" × 3".

the-shunting-puzzle.fabrica_materials: Mahogany base board, ¼" thick; brass rail strips (2mm × 1mm section) for track; engine and carriages turned or carved from cherry; hand-lettered brass plates for each carriage
the-shunting-puzzle.fabrica_dimensions: Base: 14" × 10" × ¼". Track rail height: 2mm above base. Engine block: 1½" × ¾" × ¾". Carriage blocks: 1" × ¾" × ½" each.

the-man-of-law-s-puzzle.fabrica_materials: Frame in American cherry, ¾" thick × 1" wide; tiles in bird's-eye maple, ¼" thick, with laser-engraved numerals in medieval-style serif font; base in cherry-veneered plywood
the-man-of-law-s-puzzle.fabrica_dimensions: Frame exterior: 10½" × 10½" × 1¼". Interior tray: 9¾" × 9¾". Tiles: 3" × 3" × ¼" each (8 numbered tiles). Clearance: ⅛" total gap per axis for smooth sliding.

the-four-frogs.fabrica_title: Four Frogs Puzzle — Lily Pond Edition
the-four-frogs.fabrica_materials: Nine lily pad discs hand-carved from lime wood (3" diameter, slightly concave surface); four frogs hand-carved and painted from boxwood; base rail in walnut
the-four-frogs.fabrica_dimensions: Lily pads: 3" diameter × ½" thick, slightly dished surface. Frog pieces: 1¼" × 1" × ¾" carved form. Base rail: 20" × 2" × ½" walnut, with 9 shallow recesses to hold lily pads.

chinese-pictures-water-trick.heritage_skills_title: Make a Chinese Pictures Water Trick
chinese-pictures-water-trick.fabrica_materials: 12 sheets premium cold-press watercolor paper (Arches or Fabriano, 140 lb); set of 3 artist-grade white wax resist sticks; set of 6 quality watercolor half-pans in reveal-optimized colors; hand-bound booklet with instructions
chinese-pictures-water-trick.fabrica_dimensions: Paper: 9" × 12" per sheet. Kit box: 10" × 6" × 2". Includes 3 pre-drawn reveal papers as demonstration pieces.

the-squire-s-puzzle.heritage_skills_title: Build a Knight's Tour Puzzle Board
the-squire-s-puzzle.fabrica_title: Knight's Tour Puzzle Board — Squire's Edition
the-squire-s-puzzle.fabrica_materials: Maple and American black walnut strip-built board (¾" squares); hand-carved knight in boxwood; solid walnut frame with mitered corners; backed with cherry plywood
the-squire-s-puzzle.fabrica_dimensions: Board playing surface: 8" × 8" (¾" per square). Frame: adds 1" on each side, total 10" × 10". Thickness with frame: ¾". Knight piece: approx. 2¼" tall standard chess proportions.

the-broken-chessboard.fabrica_materials: Solid maple, ½" thick, with painted and lacquered chessboard surface; pieces sawn on a precision scroll saw; walnut shadow-box tray
the-broken-chessboard.fabrica_dimensions: Board/puzzle assembled: 9" × 9" × ½". Tray: 9½" × 9½" × ¾" walnut, French-fitted with thin lining. 13 individual cut pieces.

the-rook-s-tour.heritage_skills_title: Build a Rook's Tour Puzzle Board
the-rook-s-tour.fabrica_materials: Maple and American walnut strip-built board (¾" squares); hand-turned rook in cherry; solid walnut frame with mitered corners
the-rook-s-tour.fabrica_dimensions: Board surface: 8" × 8" (¾" per square). Frame adds 1" each side, total 10" × 10". Rook: approx. 1¾" tall, 1" base diameter.

bishops-on-a-chessboard.fabrica_materials: Maple and walnut strip-built board; 14 hand-turned bishops in cherry (matching set); walnut frame
bishops-on-a-chessboard.fabrica_dimensions: Board: 8" × 8" playing surface in walnut frame (10" × 10" total). Bishop pieces: 2" tall × 1" base diameter, standard proportions.

the-eight-queens.heritage_skills_title: Build an Eight Queens Puzzle Board
the-eight-queens.fabrica_title: Eight Queens Puzzle Board — Dudeney Edition
the-eight-queens.fabrica_materials: Maple and walnut strip-built board; 8 hand-turned queens in cherry; walnut frame; playing surface optionally scored with algebraic notation
the-eight-queens.fabrica_dimensions: Board: 8" × 8" surface in 10" × 10" walnut frame. Queen pieces: 2¾" tall × 1" base diameter.

the-puzzles-of-the-black-knight.fabrica_materials: Maple and cherry strip-built 5×5 board; hand-carved knight in boxwood; presentation case in walnut
the-puzzles-of-the-black-knight.fabrica_dimensions: Board: 4¾" × 4¾" playing surface (¾" per square) in a 6" × 6" walnut frame. Knight: approximately 1¾" tall, scaled to ¾" square proportion. Case: 7" × 7" × 1" walnut.
